bug_locations.reason: The parse_cookie function incorrectly calls _unquote_cookie on all values. According to the failing test_python_cookies, cookie values should not be unquoted using this specific algorithm, as it aggressively strips quotes and handles escapes that standard browser-style parsing (which this function aims to mimic) should keep.

The _unquote_cookie function, while copied from the standard library, is being applied in a context where it interferes with the desired 'mimic browser behavior' described in the parse_cookie docstring.
